text.title: spec-structure Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for spec-structure as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Open Questions section left populated (unresolved questions still present) when Status is set to Approved.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Unresolved questions are blocker items, not optional notes. They must be resolved before design can begin.

failure-mode.description: NFRs stated as "The system should be fast and scalable."
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: No numeric target. Untestable. Cannot drive design decisions. Replace with "< 500ms p95" and "10k concurrent users".

failure-mode.description: Recommended Skills section left stale from template without being updated after design choices are made.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Stale skill references route agents to wrong methodologies. Update after design.md is written.

failure-mode.description: Related Features table left empty when features/done/ contains clearly related work.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Agents will duplicate existing implementations rather than reusing patterns from completed work.
